response.original_title: Does Exodus have a recovery phrase?{Exodus Recovery}
response.overview: Yes. Exodus wallets+⭐1-(864).336.8850  use a 12-word secret key (also called a secret recovery +⭐1-(864).336.8850  phrase) to secure and recover your funds. [1] Key Details About Your Recovery Phrase+⭐1-(864).336.8850  Purpose: It is the master key to all your crypto assets. If you lose your device, forget your password, +⭐1-(864).336.8850  +⭐1-(864).336.8850  or switch to a new phone or computer, you will use these 12 words to restore your wallet. Self-Custody: Because Exodus is a self-custody wallet, Exodus does not store this phrase on their +⭐1-(864).336.8850  +⭐1-(864).336.8850  servers. If you lose your 12 words, Exodus support cannot recover your wallet for you. Safety:
